modelIdentification.name: JLVC-CBRN
modelIdentification.purpose: JLVC-CBRN provides CBRN components neccessary for use in the JLVC federation.
modelIdentification.description: This FOM module contains the additional object attributes and interactions necessary for CBRN communication in the JLVC Federation.
modelIdentification.useHistory: JLVC2024 - Draft 1 of the JLVC Modular FOM. Corrected octet datatype use.
JLVC2024 - Updated version number from 2024 to 1.
JLVC2026 - Version 2: Updated reference dependencies to use the new RPRv3 module names. Added RPR Enumerations, RPR Minefield, RPR SE, and RPR Warfare modules as reference dependencies.

reference.identification: SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Base FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Aggregate FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Foundation FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Physical FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Enumerations FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Minefield FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Warfare FOM Module
SISO-STD-001.1-2025 - Real-time Platform Reference Synthetic Environment FOM Module

objectClass.name: JLVC_Aircraft
objectClass.semantics: Aircraft published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_GroundVehicle
objectClass.semantics: GroundVehicle published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_Spacecraft
objectClass.semantics: Spacecraft published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_SubmersibleVessel
objectClass.semantics: SubmersibleVessel published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity.

objectClass.name: JLVC_SurfaceVessel
objectClass.semantics: SurfaceVessel published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_Human
objectClass.semantics: Human published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_Munition
objectClass.semantics: Munition published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_Expendables
objectClass.semantics: Countermeasure devices with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_Radio
objectClass.semantics: Electronic devices for the communication of both audio and data, operated by entities belonging to armed forces.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_Sensor
objectClass.semantics: Sensor published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: JLVC_AggregateEntity
objectClass.semantics: Aggregate published within the JLVC with JLVC agreed upon attributes.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

objectClass.name: CounterMeasures
objectClass.semantics: Simpler counter measure implementation, originated by AWSIM

attribute.name: CBRNEffect
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED.

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL. Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

attribute.name: CBRNProtection
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL

attribute.name: CBRNEffectLowRes
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL. Specifies the MOPP level and suit parameters of this entity

attribute.name: CBRNProtection
attribute.semantics: OPTIONAL

attribute.name: AgentName
attribute.semantics: REQUIRED. Cloud contaminant or agent type.

attribute.name: CloudHeight
attribute.semantics: Height of the cloud.

attribute.name: Concentration
attribute.semantics: Concentration of contaminant in cloud.

attribute.name: SourceIdentifier
attribute.semantics: Used to associate related events.

attribute.name: Vertices
attribute.semantics: Actual vertices defining the cloud polygon. Cardinality "1+"

attribute.name: radius
attribute.semantics: Provides an alternative way to define the geometry of the cloud. When the radius is specified, the center location is required to be entered into the Vertices attribute and the associated vertex count filled into the NumVertices attribute. In meters. Optional

interactionClass.name: CBRNDetection
interactionClass.semantics: the detection of a CBRN event

parameter.name: DeliveryContainer
parameter.semantics: Optional. The container the agent was delivered in.

parameter.name: NumberOfAgentContainers
parameter.semantics: Optional. 1 to 999 number of delivery containers.

parameter.name: NumberOfDeliverySystems
parameter.semantics: Optional. 1 to 999 number of delivery systems.

interactionClass.name: CBRNentityEffect
interactionClass.semantics: Specifies the CBRN effect on an entity instance based on multiple parameters.

parameter.name: AggregateEffect
parameter.semantics: Most severe CBRN effect based on chemical, biological, radiological effects.

parameter.name: EntityID
parameter.semantics: The unique identifier for the entity instance.

interactionClass.name: CBRNexposureRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Simulation management (SIMAN) interaction to respond to entity exposure request.

interactionClass.name: CBRNexposureResponse
interactionClass.semantics: Simulation management (SIMAN) interaction to respond to exposure initialization request.

parameter.name: Originator
parameter.semantics: Federate ID of exposure process responding to initializtion request.

interactionClass.name: CBRNsensorRequest
interactionClass.semantics: Simulation management (SIMAN) interaction to initialize individual sensor.

parameter.name: AzimuthSeed
parameter.semantics: Specifiy random seed for initial sensor azimuth pointing position.

parameter.name: BlindZoneServiceID
parameter.semantics: ID corresponding to configuration file entry for sensor blind zone.

parameter.name: ElevationSeed
parameter.semantics: Specifiy random seed for initial sensor elevation pointing position.

parameter.name: InitialAzimuth
parameter.semantics: Utilize user defined initial sensor pointing azimuth[0..360].

parameter.name: InitialElevation
parameter.semantics: Utilize user defined initial sensor pointing elevation [0..360].

parameter.name: Originator
parameter.semantics: Entity instance ID of sensor host.

parameter.name: SensorDefinitionIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Id sensor in Sensor Definition File

parameter.name: UseRandomInit
parameter.semantics: Utilize random value for initial sensor pointing position.

parameter.name: UseUserDefinedInit
parameter.semantics: Utilize user defined initial sensor pointing position.

parameter.name: XOffset
parameter.semantics: X-value of sensor offset (meters from host entity center of mass)

parameter.name: YOffset
parameter.semantics: Y-value of sensor offset (meters from host entity center of mass).

parameter.name: ZOffset
parameter.semantics: Z-value of sensor offset (meters from host entity center of mass).

interactionClass.name: CBRNsensorResponse
interactionClass.semantics: Simulation management (SIMAN) interaction to respond to sensor initialization request.

parameter.name: Originator
parameter.semantics: Federate ID of sensor process responding to sensor initializtion request.

parameter.name: SensorDefinitionIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Id of sensor in Sensor Definition File

interactionClass.name: CBRNsensorStatus
interactionClass.semantics: Specifies the alarm status for a CBRN sensor.

parameter.name: AlarmStatus
parameter.semantics: Alarm status for the entity sensor (enumerated datatype).

parameter.name: EntityID
parameter.semantics: The unique identifier for the entity instance.

parameter.name: SensorDefinitionIdentifier
parameter.semantics: Id of sensor in Sensor Definition File.

interactionClass.name: CBRNtreatment
interactionClass.semantics: Specifies treatment applied to entity in response to CBRN event.

parameter.name: CBRNType
parameter.semantics: Specific treatment applied in response to CBRN event (enumerated datatype).

parameter.name: EntityID
parameter.semantics: The unique identifier for the entity instance.

simpleData.name: AngleNorthDegreeFloat32
simpleData.semantics: Number of degrees measured clockwise from True North

simpleData.name: ConcentrationGramsPerCubicMeterFloat64
simpleData.semantics: the amount of dissolved substance in a given volume of solvent

field.name: Bearing
field.semantics: Bearing measured in degrees from True North

field.name: ContamDetected
field.semantics: indicates whether contamination is detected (true) or not
